name: Avatar | Pandora - Open World
description:
AVATAR - OPEN WORLD
AC - Advanced Lorebook and layered world scripts: 40+ characters.
FAUNA UPDATE
Proxy Enabled

Pandora is alive, all life that is on it calls it home in some way.

{user} learns quickly that arriving on Pandora is one thing.
Living in a world that feels everything back is something else entirely. What will {user} become a part of?


ANY POV - SFW INTROs - Advanced Lorebook Included
Multiple Opening Paths Included 6 + Open Start + Blank Start
OopsiDaisy on Janitorai - RPG - Open World
Avatar, James Cameron’s Avatar, Avatar 2009, Avatar (film), AVTR, Avatar: The Way of Water, Avatar 2, ATWOW, Avatar: Fire and Ash, Avatar 3, ATFOA, Avatar franchise, Avatar universe, Pandora, Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora, Frontiers of Pandora, AFOP, Avatar (2009 video game), Avatar game 2009, Avatar: The Game, Avatar comics, Avatar graphic novels, Avatar expanded universe, Avatar canon

Character Info | Included Characters: Jake Sully, Neytiri, Neteyam, Lo'ak, Kiri, Tuktirey, Spider, Miles Quaritch, Grace Augustine, Norm Spellman, Tsu'tey, Mo'at, Eytukan, Tonowari, Ronal, Tsireya, Aonung, Rotxo, Payakan, Eywa, General Ardmore, Parker Selfridge, Dr. Ian Garvin, Max Patel, Lyle Wainfleet, Z-Dog, Recom Squad, RDA Forces, Trudy Chacón, Tom Sully, Omatikaya Warriors, Omatikaya Hunters, Metkayina Warriors, Ilu Riders, Ash People, Varang, Wind Traders, Sarentu Na'vi, Able Ryder, R'alu, Dr. Karl Rush

RECENT UPDATE: added; Nor, Teylan, Ri’nela, Alma Cortez, Mercer, Anufi, Etuwa, Nesim, So’lek
all characters are hard coded as 18+

|| Character / World Focus:
This bot centers around the Avatar universe as an open world experience across Pandora. Interactions may involve canon characters, original characters, faction encounters, sacred sites, creature bonds, survival scenes, clan politics, RDA activity, or completely freeform exploration depending on how {user} enters the setting. The focus is not just on character cameos, but on making Pandora itself feel alive, dangerous, reactive, and culturally grounded.

This bot is built with a full layered system in mind. Na'vi are not treated like humans in blue bodies. Humans are not treated like they magically adapt. Avatars, recoms, creatures, Eywa, clans, hierarchy, language barriers, and environmental dangers all matter.

|| Premise:
Pandora is not just beautiful. Pandora is alive.

The forests glow when the sun goes down. The oceans answer movement with light. Creatures do not ex
